feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: 401 Unauthorized error calling odata service on on-premise from BTP RAP app
entry.content:
Hi experts! We created a RAP app on BTP and trying where we are calling an oData Service on an on-premise system. We created an entry in cloud connector, communication system, -arragement, etc. In the communication system app, I added my user under "Users for Outbound Communication". when I debugg the app and calling the oData Service I get a provider application error "401 unauthorized". 

Do you know, what has to be done to solve the error?

Thanks, Sebastian

entry.title: Custom Entity - SAP RAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I created a CDS based on a custom entity in SAP RAP cloud. I added a new button to this CDS. This button will perform an action on all records displayed on the screen. However, in the class I defined in the behavior, I cannot read the data on the screen. How can I do it?"

Thanks,

entry.title: How to get the get communication system id in multi tenant scenario?
entry.content:
Hi experts!

How do I get the correct System ID (comm_system_id) of an on-prem system in a multi-tenant scenario?

* --- get destination based on Communication Arrangement and the service ID
        DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement(
          comm_scenario  = comm_parameter-comm_scenario
          comm_system_id = comm_system_id
          service_id     = comm_parameter-service_id ).

Thanks, Sebastian

entry.title: How to programmatically switch detail tabs in MIGO
entry.content:
I implemented BADI MB_MIGO_BADI and added a new sub-screen tab called Lot Detail.

The business is requesting that after the PO is entered for a goods receipt that the "Quantity" tab be displayed first versus the tab "Lot Detail".  Can someone point me in the right direction?

entry.title: Adobe form to display blank value(space) for all records in the table for 0 for particular field
entry.content:
In Adobe form i have a field Dunning level in table for which i am getting numrical value if the value is 0 i want to display it as blank (Space only ) how can i handle this in SAP adobe forms.

Thanks

entry.title: Ho to create a Testuser for RAP App in BTP?
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

is there any tutorial on how to create a testuser for testing roles and authorization of a RAP App? I haven't found any.

I tried to create a new user in BTP Subaccount and assigned some roles (I don't know which roles are needed) and created a user in the App "Manage Business Users" with the same email-address in the Dashboard of the ABAP Environment. I haven't received any "welcome" email Note: The email-Address is not linked to a SAP Account. my previous attempts have all failed.

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Outbound connection to SAP S/4 system from BTP
entry.content: Do we have an option to implement Oauth authentication while integrating BTP with SAP S/4 On prem system as a destination system

entry.title: ABAP CERTIFICATION
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to do the ABAP certification exam but i don't feel ready, i have only read from the sap training hub . If anyone has dump files or sites i can do trial papers please share. Any tips will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: ZATCA Error onboarding system using T-Code SACSIDG to generate CSSID OPERATION "Unauthorization" 401
entry.content:
GUI SYSTEM :  T-Code SACSIDG to generate CSSID request error "UnAuthorization".

Soap Manager Request successfully.

CPI Body Response Error

"Error while obtaining token from UAA, with details: Request failed with status code 401"

I think SCI_Host name is incorrect , could you please help me to create SCI_Host name.

https://<subdomainName>.it-cpi<xxx>.cfapps.<datacenter>.hana.ondemand.com

If another error in my configuration let me know . Thanks

entry.title: Business Catalog missing in App "Manage Launchpad Pages"
entry.content:
Hi Experts! 

I created a RAP App on BTP and now try to create a Tile in the Launchpad. I followed tutorials and everything worked fine except that my Business Catalog doesn't appear in the App "Manage Launchpad Pages". When I assign other Catalogs to the Business Role, they appear. So, everything else seams to be correct (Assignment of Role, User, Space, Page, etc.). Does anyone know, what could be the reason I don't see my catalog?

 

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: ABAP RAP Custom Entity with Parameter not allowed
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I have created custom entity and Implemented if_rap_query_provider~select method. Service I created in V4 API.

This custom entity is with NO parameter is working as expected and returning all results.

When I added parameter to this Custom Entity It started giving me below Error ->

Entity 'ZCE_TU_DETAILS': Parameter entity set '$PARAMETER$ZCE_TU_DETAILS' cannot be used for read

I do not know how to test or use this Custom Entity with parameter... please help pointing to any documentation or example...

I have followed below documentation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/using-parameters-in-unmanaged-query?version=sap_btp 

Please help...

@Ramjeekorada @Ramjee_korada 

Thanks-

entry.title: Unable to get values in ABAP CDS -Vendor withholding tax amount (BSAK-SKFBT, BSEG-QSSHB)
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to get the vendor withholding Tax base amount for vendors and need to report by vendor, with Ac doc #, correspodning clearing doc# etc. When I build a query/sql in the SQL COnsole I am able to get the values exactly matching to the SAP Screen data form BSAK-SKFBT or BSEG-QSSHB fields. But when I build as a ABAP CDS view these fields are not accesible or available for the CDS View output. 

I understand BSAK, BSIK, BSEG and KPF are all views in S4 HANA. Any otehr options or tables that I can use to derive the data?

Thanks for your help in advance.

Arthur.

entry.title: Cannot release transport request in ABAP Cloud Project although I only receive ATC warnings
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I cannot release my transport request in ABAP Cloud Project although I only receive ATC warnings. Documentation says, that only errors have to be solved.

Does anyone know, what I must do to get my transport request released?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Creating a popup with depending fields
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I need to develop a Popup for a Fiori APP/serivce via REST in BTP, with two fields. Both fields need a value help or drop down list. The possible values list of field 2 are depending on the entered value in field 1. Both fields are mandatory, so I must garantee that either the field 2 can be maintained only if a value in field 1 is given or I need to display a messasge to inform the user that he has to maintain field 1 first. 

Regarding the message, I already created a Question - unfortunately without a usefull answer.

Display a message from Custom Entity / Query Imple... - SAP Community

Does anyone know, how to solve this basic reuqirement?

Thanks, Sebastian

entry.title: How to display invalid entry message in calculation view input paramter
entry.content:
Hi all,

We need to implement a feature that displays an “invalid entry” message when a user inputs invalid data into the input parameter of a calculation view created in Business application studio. Despite extensive research, I have not found any viable solutions. Could someone please advise if there is an available option to achieve this?

Thanks in advance!

Chethan

entry.title: Update Site/Profit center in invoice when invoice is posted via EDI
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a requirement to enhance the invoice and update the site and profit center from Idoc that is posting it.

could you please suggest me the enhancement/user exits to achieve this... 

Main thing is I should be able to read idoc number in that exit.. I tried to update table DRSEG in one enhancement section, it did update site but not profit center.

please help

entry.title: Error while pulling Branch to Test System in Abap Environment on BTP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

While pulling a branch of a software component to Test system, I got errors "Type /.../CX_RUNTIME is unknown".

In my eclipse ABAP Cloud Project everything is fine and the object exists. In the transport request, there is just one entry for the object /.../CX_RUNTIME (Type APIS). I changed the release state to C1. The class itself is not in the TR. 

I created another TR an put the class /.../CX_RUNTIME itself in, released it and pulled the branch again. I got the same errors.

Does anyone of you know, how to fix this problem?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Edit button in business configuration app is disabled
entry.content:
Hi ,

I created business configuration for one of my table in the BTP environment using the following steps.

- https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-configuration-object.html

- https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-authorization-control.html

But somehow the edit button in the business configuration app is still disabled.

entry.title: I have a source PO for that PO account assignment category is selected as F and we were able to see
entry.content:
I have a source po for which account assignment category is selected as F and we can see the customer under items->delivery address but for the diversed po we were not able to see the account assignment category and customer number in delivery address.

Please help me how to solve this

entry.title: Movimento 343 SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
### #Fiz o movimento 343 do 2000 para o 1000 no SAP agora está dando erro de movimento não permitido

como faço o estorno dessa transação ou como faço para acertar
